_pretenured_869662_makeRoomAtLast "Make some empty slots at the end of the array. If we have more than 50% free space, then just move the elements, so that the last 50% of the slots are free, otherwise add new free slots to the end by growing. Precondition: lastIndex = array size"

	| tally newFirstIndex newLastIndex |
	tally := self size.
	tally * 2 >= lastIndex ifTrue: [
		^ self _pretenured_869662_growAtLast ].
	tally = 0 ifTrue: [ ^ self resetTo: 1 ].
	newLastIndex := lastIndex // 2.
	newFirstIndex := newLastIndex - lastIndex + firstIndex.
	array
		replaceFrom: newFirstIndex
		to: newLastIndex
		with: array
		startingAt: firstIndex.
	array from: newLastIndex + 1 to: lastIndex put: nil.
	firstIndex := newFirstIndex.
	lastIndex := newLastIndex

_pretenured_869662_growAtLast "Add new empty slots to the end of array, while keeping the empty slots at the front."

	"OrderedCollection new capacity >>> 10"

	"(OrderedCollection new growAtLast; capacity) >>> 20"

	| newArray |
	newArray := self class arrayType newTenured: (array size * 2 max: 1).
	newArray
		replaceFrom: firstIndex
		to: lastIndex
		with: array
		startingAt: firstIndex.
	array := newArray

_pretenured_869662_addLast: newObject "Add newObject to the end of the receiver. Answer newObject."

	lastIndex = array size ifTrue: [
		self _pretenured_869662_makeRoomAtLast ].
	lastIndex := lastIndex + 1.
	^ array at: lastIndex put: newObject

	| tally newFirstIndex newLastIndex |

	tally * 2 >= lastIndex ifTrue: [

	tally = 0 ifTrue: [ ^ self resetTo: 1 ].
	newLastIndex := lastIndex // 2.

	array

		to: newLastIndex
		with: array

	array from: newLastIndex + 1 to: lastIndex put: nil.
	firstIndex := newFirstIndex.
	lastIndex := newLastIndex

	| newArray |

	newArray
		replaceFrom: firstIndex
		to: lastIndex
		with: array
		startingAt: firstIndex.
	array := newArray

_pretenured_86169303_addLast: newObject "Add newObject to the end of the receiver. Answer newObject."

	lastIndex = array size ifTrue: [
		self _pretenured_86169303_makeRoomAtLast ].
	lastIndex := lastIndex + 1.
	^ array at: lastIndex put: newObject

_pretenured_86169303_add: newObject "Add a new object at the end of the collection, and returns the object itself"

	"((OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) add: 43; yourself) asArray >>> #(42 43)"

	"Add returns the object itself"

	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42) >>> 42"

	"You may want to use yourself to return the collection itself"

	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) class >>> OrderedCollection"

	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) size >>> 1"

	^ self _pretenured_86169303_addLast: newObject

	| tally newFirstIndex newLastIndex |
	tally := self size.
	tally * 2 >= lastIndex ifTrue: [

	tally = 0 ifTrue: [ ^ self resetTo: 1 ].

	array

	array from: newLastIndex + 1 to: lastIndex put: nil.

	| newArray |

	newArray
		replaceFrom: firstIndex
		to: lastIndex
		with: array
		startingAt: firstIndex.
	array := newArray

	"((OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) add: 43; yourself) asArray >>> #(42 43)"

	"Add returns the object itself"

	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42) >>> 42"

	"You may want to use yourself to return the collection itself"

	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) class >>> OrderedCollection"

	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) size >>> 1"

	^ self _pretenured_796327484_addLast: newObject

_pretenured_382711116_widthAndKernedWidthOfLeft: leftCharacter right: rightCharacterOrNil into: aTwoElementArray "Set the first element of aTwoElementArray to the width of leftCharacter and
	the second element to the width of left character when kerned with
	rightCharacterOrNil. Answer the receiver

	We use a widthAndKernedWidthCache to store these values for speed"

	| privateArray |
	privateArray := (self widthAndKernedWidthCache
		                 at: leftCharacter
		                 ifAbsentPut: [ Dictionary new ])
		                at: (rightCharacterOrNil ifNil: [ 0 asCharacter ])
		                ifAbsentPut: [
				                super
					                widthAndKernedWidthOfLeft: leftCharacter
					                right: rightCharacterOrNil
					                into: (Array newTenured: 2) ].
	"We can't answer privateArray, we MUST copy its elements into aTwoElementArray"
	aTwoElementArray
		at: 1 put: (privateArray at: 1);
		at: 2 put: (privateArray at: 2).
	^ aTwoElementArray

_pretenured_382711116_at: key ifAbsentPut: aBlock "Return the value at the given key.
	If the key is not included in the receiver store and return the result
	of evaluating aBlock as the new value."

	^ self
		  _pretenured_382711116_at: key
		  ifAbsent: [ self at: key put: aBlock value ]

_pretenured_382711116_at: key ifAbsent: aBlock "Answer the value associated with the key or, if key isn't found,
	answer the result of evaluating aBlock."

	^ ((array at: (self findElementOrNil: key))
		   ifNil: [ aBlock ]
		   ifNotNil: [ :assoc | assoc ]) value

_pretenured_333867595_widthAndKernedWidthOfLeft: leftCharacter right: rightCharacterOrNil into: aTwoElementArray "Set the first element of aTwoElementArray to the width of leftCharacter and
	the second element to the width of left character when kerned with
	rightCharacterOrNil. Answer the receiver

	We use a widthAndKernedWidthCache to store these values for speed"

	| privateArray |
	privateArray := (self widthAndKernedWidthCache
		                 at: leftCharacter
		                 ifAbsentPut: [ Dictionary new ])
		                at: (rightCharacterOrNil ifNil: [ 0 asCharacter ])
		                ifAbsentPut: [
				                super
					                widthAndKernedWidthOfLeft: leftCharacter
					                right: rightCharacterOrNil
					                into: (Array newTenured: 2) ].
	"We can't answer privateArray, we MUST copy its elements into aTwoElementArray"
	aTwoElementArray
		at: 1 put: (privateArray at: 1);
		at: 2 put: (privateArray at: 2).
	^ aTwoElementArray

_pretenured_333867595_at: key ifAbsentPut: aBlock "Return the value at the given key.
	If the key is not included in the receiver store and return the result
	of evaluating aBlock as the new value."

	^ self at: key ifAbsent: [ self at: key put: aBlock value ]

_pretenured_333867595_at: key ifAbsent: aBlock "Answer the value associated with the key or, if key isn't found,
	answer the result of evaluating aBlock."

	^ ((array at: (self findElementOrNil: key))
		   ifNil: [ aBlock ]
		   ifNotNil: [ :assoc | assoc ]) value

_pretenured_29276380_copyWith: newElement "Answer a copy of the receiver that is 1 bigger than the receiver and has
	newElement at the last element."

	| newIC |
	newIC := self species newTenured: self size + 1.
	newIC
		replaceFrom: 1
		to: self size
		with: self
		startingAt: 1.
	newIC at: newIC size put: newElement.
	^ newIC

updateCacheOnAddingOf: anElement (byType privateMooseStorageAt: anElement class)
		_pretenured_796327484_add: anElement.
	^ anElement

uncheckUnsafeAdd: element "Calls the implementation in OrderedCollection."

	super _pretenured_869662_addLast: element

resetPrivateState entityAttributes := #(  ).
	cache := SmallDictionary newTenured

newTenured "Answer a new initialized instance of the receiver (which is a class) with no indexable variables. Fail if the class is indexable."

	^ self basicNew initialize

initialize super initialize.
	keys := Array new: 2.
	values := Array newTenured: 2.
	size := 0
flush cache initialize
entityAt: aSerial ifAbsent: aBlock ^ serialDict _pretenured_333867595_at: aSerial ifAbsent: aBlock

dangling: reference to: serial (reminderDict
		 _pretenured_382711116_at: serial
		 ifAbsentPut: [ OrderedCollection new ]) _pretenured_86169303_add:
		reference.
	numberOfDanglingReferences := numberOfDanglingReferences + 1.
	^ reference

createInstance ^ implementingClass
		  ifNil: [ FMRuntimeElement new description: self ]
		  ifNotNil: [ implementingClass newTenured ]

attributeAt: name put: value | aName |
	aName := name asSymbol.
	1 to: entityAttributes size do: [ :n |
			aName == (entityAttributes at: n) key ifTrue: [
				^ ((entityAttributes at: n) value: value) value ] ].
	entityAttributes := entityAttributes _pretenured_29276380_copyWith:
		                    aName -> value.
	^ entityAttributes last value
